---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like and how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Backend (API / services / infrastructure)
- [ ] Frontend (UI / UX / caching)
- [ ] Database (schema / queries / migrations)
- [ ] Infrastructure (Azure / Bicep / CI/CD)
- [ ] Security (auth / rate limiting / WAF)
- [ ] Maintenance (cleanup jobs / monitoring)

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
